steps.title: Find the clause verb
steps.content: The relative clause begins with that and has bits of molten rock as its subject. The phrase after cooling and solidifying into glass interrupts the clause but does not supply the main verb.

steps.title: Use a finite verb
steps.content: The clause needs a finite verb: bits of molten rock rain back onto Mars's surface. To rain, raining, and having rained are nonfinite forms and cannot complete the clause as its main verb. The answer is D.
